steps.title: Spot the passage's two-part movement
steps.content: The passage begins with “Hiroshi Senju is known worldwide” — introducing a specific artist — then details what makes his paintings distinctive: their scale, his compositional choices, and his materials.

steps.title: Identify which choice names that structure
steps.content: Choice A matches directly: it names the two-part movement (introduce artist, then explain characteristics of his paintings). The other three either flip the order (B), focus on comparing two paintings (C), or claim the work is overlooked when the passage says he's “known worldwide” (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
